channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lights 53F-6 and 53F-7 still not working, 18th July
item.description:
Lights 53F-6 and 53F-7 still not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed, 18th July
item.description:
Dumped rubbish against my drive
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frant Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Port bike left in permit parking area, 18th July
item.description:
Needs to be removed as this is not a valid area for port rental bikes to be parked. This needs to be removed as it is taking up vital permit parking space and also is a danger to private personal cars as they tip over and cause damage to private car property. Please kindly remove ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chiltern Street, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: As there is still loads of trash bags in front of controller unable to gain access, 18th July
item.description:
As there is still loads of trash bags in front of controller unable to gain access
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 18th July

item.title: Fridge and bookcase dumped on corner, 18th July
item.description:
This site continues to experience frequent fly-tipping, presumably because of the large recycling bin next to it. I can't understand why steps haven't veen taken to put up signage and monitor it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Inverton Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th July
item.description:
Ct19jko reg van flytipping on pavement. I have full dash cam footage of 3 drivebys.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Road East, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.title: Wind blown rubbish and litter, 18th July
item.description:
All along the pavement on Croydon Rd adjoining the park railings is loads of old wind blown plastic items and general rubbish. Needs a good sweeping. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Da14 5ls, 18th July
item.description:
The grass and bushes have not been cut for one year . Ruxley Close DA14 5LS, opposite 5, 6 , 7 , you did not provide any service , just charge us for a council tax , thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ruxley Close, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New tree seems to have died at this location., 18th July
item.description:
Need another tree to be set. I am prepared to water new tree and anything else you would require me to do. John OHegarty
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bicknor Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping at Kimmeridge Road recycling site, 18th July
item.description:
Flytipping at Kimmeridge Road recycling site

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kimmeridge Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Back of st George's road, 18th July
item.description:
There is a significant accumulation of large tree logs, heavy wood debris, and extremely tall weeds (predominantly stinging nettles and ivy) encroaching onto the edge of the public pathway/roadway. The overgrowth and debris are creating a physical obstruction, reducing the usable width of the path, and presenting a safety hazard for pedestrians. Please investigate and arrange for the clearance of the wood logs and overgrown weeds. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Montague Place, High Firs, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet
